nodes.title: GET /businesses/:bizId/vouchers
nodes.description: api.ts line 647: Protected by bizAuthMiddleware(). Queries vouchers table filtered by businessId. Returns array of voucher objects.

nodes.title: GET /businesses/:bizId/vouchers-enhanced
nodes.description: enhancements.ts line 20: Enhanced voucher listing with filters (type, status, dateFrom, dateTo, search). Joins with accounts and users. Supports pagination.

nodes.title: POST /businesses/:bizId/vouchers
nodes.description: api.ts line 656: Validates operationTypeId is required. Validates source/target accounts belong to business. Blocks safe-to-safe transfers. Generates sequence number. Updates account_balances and fund_balances. Uses database transaction.

nodes.title: POST /businesses/:bizId/vouchers-draft
nodes.description: enhancements.ts line 672: Creates voucher with status='draft'. Does NOT update balances. Stores for later confirmation.

nodes.title: PUT /businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id
nodes.description: enhancements.ts line 92: Updates voucher fields (amount, description, date, etc). Validates voucher belongs to business.

nodes.title: DELETE /businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id
nodes.description: api.ts line 882: Deletes voucher. REVERSES account_balances and fund_balances (debit becomes credit, credit becomes debit). Uses database transaction.

nodes.title: POST /businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id/reverse
nodes.description: api.ts line 2940: Creates a new reversal voucher with swapped debit/credit. Updates balances accordingly. Links to original voucher.

nodes.title: POST /businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id/status
nodes.description: enhancements.ts line 124: Changes voucher status (draft->confirmed, confirmed->cancelled). When confirming draft: updates balances. When cancelling: reverses balances.

nodes.title: GET /businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id/details
nodes.description: enhancements.ts line 232: Returns full voucher details with joined account names, fund names, user info, and operation type.

nodes.title: GET /businesses/:bizId/account-balance/:accountId
nodes.description: enhancements.ts line 209: Returns current balance for specific account from account_balances table.
